scope: Completion patch for incomplete/overclaimed repository-steward remediation phases. Changes are repository structure, metadata, indexes, validators, and archive placement only.

phaseCompletionEffects.phase1: COMPLETE: navigation README/folder-status artifacts are PACKAGE_METADATA and activeLaw=false in MATERIAL_STATUS and authority indexes.
phaseCompletionEffects.phase2: COMPLETE: folder.status.json files use canonical camelCase fields; legacy snake_case compatibility keys removed.
phaseCompletionEffects.phase4: COMPLETE: generated-currentness workflow no longer duplicates full validation suite.
phaseCompletionEffects.phase11: COMPLETE: implementation same-basename schema copies physically renamed; review-held copies physically archived.
phaseCompletionEffects.phase12: COMPLETE: traceability generated copy self-marks derived source.
phaseCompletionEffects.phase13: COMPLETE: generated contract/example/traceability maps self-mark derived source and do-not-cite status.
phaseCompletionEffects.phase14: COMPLETE: root reviewed_* snapshots moved into archive/review_holding zip.
phaseCompletionEffects.phase15: COMPLETE: 04_implementation_and_conformance physically split into controlled lane directories.
phaseCompletionEffects.phase18: COMPLETE: blank traceability status cells filled.
phaseCompletionEffects.phase20: MOSTLY_COMPLETE: guardrails now enforce structural invariants introduced in Batch 2.

remainingKnownDebt: External consumers with hard-coded old 04 paths must follow updated indexes/path replacements. Archived review-held snapshots are preserved in a zip and not expanded in the default repository tree.
